```{r, include=FALSE}
        # cond <- all_areas_nuseds$IndexId %in% c("CN_3334") & all_areas_nuseds$GFE_ID == 1194
        # all_areas_nuseds[cond,c("IndexId","GFE_ID","FULL_CU_IN","POPULATION","WATERBODY","END_SPAWN_DT_FROM","END_SPAWN_DT_TO")] |> unique()
        #' we see that dates are all later that mid-Sept --> it is probably the FALL CU.
        #' So no need to do anything.
        # if(cond_CN_3334){
        #   layer_CU <- st_intersects(point, st_buffer(CUs_gdb[cond_rg_sp,],dist = .1))
        # }
        
        cond_CO_7776 <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$IndexId[r] == "CO_7776" & trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$GFE_ID[r] == 2692
        #' here POPULATION = "Jenny Bay West Creek (Bella Coola) Coho"
        #' but the GFE_ID (SNOOKA CREEK) intersects with CU Northern Coastal Streams, 
        #' which is probably not the right CU.
        #' Indeed, CO_7776 is also associated with GFE_ID = 2692 (JENNY BAY WEST CREEK), 
        #' and was previously associate with CU Bella Coola-Dean Rivers, which matches better
        #' POPULATION. So we change the CU_NAME selected below.
        if(cond_CO_7776){
          layer_CU[[1]] <- which(CUs_gdb[cond_rg_sp,]$DFO_CU_NAME == "Bella Coola-Dean Rivers")
          comment <- paste0(comment,"; CU selected: ","Bella Coola-Dean Rivers")
        }
        
        cond_SX_46279 <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$IndexId[r] == "SX_46279"
        #' POPULATION = Cayenne Creek (Clearwater) Late Sockeye
        #' WATERBODY = CAYENNE CREEK
        #' Issue: it intersect with CU:
        #' - Momich-Early summer   SEL --> early vs. late
        #' So need to increase the radius:
        if(cond_SX_46279){
          layer_CU <- st_intersects(point, st_buffer(CUs_gdb[cond_rg_sp,],dist = .05))
        }
        #' Now there are four choices:
        #' - Shuswap Complex-Early Summer Timing      SEL-09-02     SEL Current
        #' - Shuswap Complex-Late Timing              SEL-09-03     SEL Current --> the one, even if it falls outside the zone
        #' - Momich-Early summer                           <NA>     SEL Extinct
        #' - Adams-Early Summer                            <NA>     SEL Extinct
        
        # This Chum population falls outside the only Fraser Chum CU
        cond_CM_7769 <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$IndexId[r] == "CM_7769"
        if(cond_CM_7769){
          layer_CU <- st_intersects(point, st_buffer(x =  CUs_gdb[cond_rg_sp,], dist = .2))
        }
        
        if(length(layer_CU[[1]]) == 0){ # no match, try to buffer
          dist <- .05
          layer_CU <- st_intersects(point, st_buffer(x =  CUs_gdb[cond_rg_sp,], dist = dist))
        }
        
        if(length(layer_CU[[1]]) == 0){ # no match, try to buffer
          
          cond_buffer_.2 <- region == "Fraser" & species_name == "Chum"  # there is only one Chum Cu in the Fraser
          cond_SX_3438 <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$IndexId[r] == "SX_3438"
          
          if(cond_buffer_.2 | cond_SX_3438){
            dist <- .2
            layer_CU <- st_intersects(point, st_buffer(x =  CUs_gdb[cond_rg_sp,], dist = dist))
          }
          
          if(cond_SX_3438){
            #' there are two choices
            #' - Shuswap Complex-Early Summer Timing
            #' - Shuswap Complex-Late Timing              --> the one
            #' The POPULATION is Loftus Creek Late Sockeye 
            i <- which(grepl("Late",CUs_gdb[cond_rg_sp,]$DFO_CU_NAME[layer_CU[[1]]]))
            
            comment <- paste(comment,"More than one CU layer: ",sep = "; ")
            CUs <- paste(CUs_gdb[cond_rg_sp,]$DFO_CU_NAME[layer_CU[[1]]],collapse = "; ")
            comment <- paste(comment,CUs,collapse = "")
            CU_NAME_selected <- CUs_gdb[cond_rg_sp,][layer_CU[[1]],]$CU_NAME[i]
            comment <- paste0(comment,"; CU selected: ",CU_NAME_selected)
            
            layer_CU[[1]] <- layer_CU[[1]][i]
          }
        }
        
        
        cond_CO_3027 <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$IndexId[r] == "CO_3027" # & GFE_ID == 2655
        #' here POPULATION = "Wathlsto Creek (Kitimat-Butedale) Coho"
        #' CU choices = "Douglas Channel-Kitimat Arm" vs. "Northern Coastal Streams" --> the last one
        #' --> "Douglas Channel-Kitimat Arm" selected

        cond_SEL_7805 <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$IndexId[r] == "SX_7805" # & GFE_ID == 2792
        #' here POPULATION = "Moore Lake (Grenville Principe) Sockeye"
        #' CU choices = "Northern Coastal Fjords" "Tsimtack/Lakes"
        #' --> "Tsimtack/Lakes" selected
        
        cond_SEL_7818 <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$IndexId[r] == "SX_7818" # & GFE_ID == 64745
        #' here POPULATION = "Atnarko Lakes Sockeye"
        #' CU choices = "Northern Coastal Fjords" "South Atnarko Lakes"
        #' --> "South Atnarko Lakes" selected
        
        cond_SEL_52080 <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$IndexId[r] == "SX_52080" # & GFE_ID == 1303
        #' here POPULATION = "Kennedy Lake Sockeye"
        #' CU choices =  "West Vancouver Island" "Kennedy"
        #' --> "Kennedy" selected
        
        cond_SER_52120 <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$IndexId[r] == "SX_52120" # & GFE_ID == 1307
        #' here POPULATION = "Clayoquot Arm Beaches Sockeye"
        #' CU choices = "West Vancouver Island" "Kennedy" 
        #' --> "West Vancouver Island" selected
        
        cond_CM_7775 <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$IndexId[r] == "CM_7775" # & GFE_ID == 2252
        #' here POPULATION =  "Noosgulch River (Bella Coola) Chum"
        #' CU choices = "Bella Coola-Dean Rivers" "Bella Coola River-Late" 
        #' --> "Bella Coola-Dean Rivers" selected
        
        cond_SX_3077 <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$IndexId[r] == "SX_3077" # & GFE_ID == 2753
        #' here POPULATION =  "Butterfield Creek Early Stuart Sockeye"
        #' CU choices = "Takla/Trembleur/Stuart-Summer Timing" "Takla/Trembleur-Early Stuart Timing"
        #' --> "Takla/Trembleur-Early Stuart Timing" selected
        
        cond_SX_3085 <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$IndexId[r] == "SX_3085" # & GFE_ID == 2761
        #' here POPULATION =  "Tarnezell Creek Early Stuart Sockeye"
        #' CU choices = "Takla/Trembleur/Stuart-Summer Timing" "Takla/Trembleur-Early Stuart Timing"
        #' --> "Takla/Trembleur-Early Stuart Timing" selected
        
        cond_SX_7640 <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$IndexId[r] == "SX_7640" # & GFE_ID == 26773
        #' here POPULATION = "Hlina Creek (Salmon Arm) Late Sockeye"
        #' CU choices = "Shuswap Complex-Early Summer Timing" "Shuswap Complex-Late Timing"
        #' --> "Shuswap Complex-Late Timing" selected
        
        cond_SX_7639 <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$IndexId[r] == "SX_7639"
        #' POPULATION = Four Mile Creek (Salmon Arm) Late Sockeye
        #' There are two choices:
        #' - Shuswap Complex-Early Summer Timing      SEL-09-02
        #' -         Shuswap Complex-Late Timing      SEL-09-03 --> the one
        
        cond_SX_45013 <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$IndexId[r] == "SX_45013" # & GFE_ID == 2391 --> not necessary
        #' POPULATION = Burton Creek (Clearwater) Early Summer Sockeye
        #' There are three choices but only one makes sense: not extinct and eary summer
        #' - Shuswap Complex-Early Summer Timing      SEL-09-02     SEL Current   --> the one
        #' - Shuswap Complex-Late Timing      SEL-09-03     SEL Current 
        #' - Adams-Early Summer           <NA>     SEL Extinct
        # NO: --> cuid 760, cu_name_pse "Adams-Early Summer" if WATERBODY == "BURTON CREEK" GFE_ID == 2391
        
        cond_SX_46248 <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$IndexId[r] == "SX_46248"  # & GFE_ID == 221 --> not necessary
        #' POPULATION = Adams River (Upper) (Clearwater) Early Summer Sockeye
        #' There are three choices but only one makes sense: not extinct and early summer
        #' - Shuswap Complex-Early Summer Timing      SEL-09-02     SEL Current   --> the one
        #' - Shuswap         Complex-Late Timing      SEL-09-03     SEL Current 
        #' - Adams-Early Summer           <NA>     SEL Extinct
        # NO: --> cuid 760, cu_name_pse "Adams-Early Summer" if WATERBODY == "ADAMS RIVER - UPPER" GFE_ID == 221
        
        cond_SX_46268 <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$IndexId[r] == "SX_46268"
        #' POPULATION = Momich/Cayenne (Clearwater) Early Summer Sockeye
        #' There are three choices but only one makes sense: not extinct and early summer
        #' - Shuswap Complex-Early Summer Timing      SEL-09-02     SEL Current   --> the one
        #' - Shuswap Complex-Late Timing      SEL-09-03     SEL Current 
        #' - Adams-Early Summer           <NA>     SEL Extinct
        
        cond_SX_46308 <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$IndexId[r] == "SX_46308"
        #' POPULATION = Ross Creek (Salmon Arm) Early Summer Sockeye
        #' There are two choices but only one makes sense: early summer
        #' - Shuswap Complex-Early Summer Timing      SEL-09-02     SEL Current   --> the one
        #' - Shuswap Complex-Late Timing      SEL-09-03     SEL Current 
        
        cond_SX_7491 <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$IndexId[r] == "SX_7491"
        #' POPULATION = Stephens Creek Sockeye
        #' There are two choices:
        #' - Skeena River         SER-18 
        #' -     Stephens      SEL-21-09 --> the one (?)
        
        cond_SX_7823 <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$IndexId[r] == "SX_7823"
        #' POPULATION = Ormond Creek (Prince George) Early Summer Sockeye
        #' There are two choices:
        #' - Francois/Fraser-Summer Timing      SEL-06-07      Current
        #' - Fraser_Early Summer<<Extirpated>>           <NA> Extinct --> the one, but does not seem extinct as there is still recent data
        
        cond_SX_7833 <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$IndexId[r] == "SX_7833"
        #' POPULATION = Whiminaski Lake System (Upper Nass) Sockeye
        #' There are two choices:
        #' - Upper Nass River         SER-21        SER Current  
        #' - Damdochax/Winimasik      SEL-24-02     SEL Current   --> the one because of the Lake
        
        cond_CN_46658 <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$IndexId[r] == "CN_46658"
        #' POPULATION = Dunn Creek (Clearwater) Chinook Run 1 
        #' Choices: 
        #' - North Thompson River (Spring 5-2)
        #' - North Thompson River (Summer 5-2) --> the one, according to 
        #' https://waves-vagues.dfo-mpo.gc.ca/library-bibliotheque/348529.pdf?utm_source=chatgpt.com
        
        cond_SX_7490 <-  trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$IndexId[r] == "SX_7490"
        #' POPULATION = Middle River Sockeye
        #' Choices: 
        #' - Takla/Trembleur/Stuart-Summer Timing
        #' - Takla/Trembleur-Early Stuart Timing
        #' START_DTT	END_DTT      --> not early 
        #' 08-Sep-24	14-Oct-24
        
        if(length(layer_CU[[1]]) > 1){
          
          comment <- paste(comment,"More than one CU layer: ",sep = "; ")
          CUs <- paste(CUs_gdb[cond_rg_sp,]$DFO_CU_NAME[layer_CU[[1]]],collapse = "; ")
          comment <- paste(comment,CUs,collapse = "")
          
          CU_NAME_selected <- NA
          
          if(cond_CO_3027){
            CU_NAME_selected <- "Douglas Channel-Kitimat Arm" 
          }else if(cond_SEL_7805){
            CU_NAME_selected <- "Tsimtack/Lakes"
          }else if(cond_SEL_7818){
            CU_NAME_selected <- "South Atnarko Lakes"
          }else if(cond_SEL_52080){
            CU_NAME_selected <- "Kennedy"
          }else if(cond_SER_52120){
            CU_NAME_selected <- "West Vancouver Island"
          }else if(cond_CM_7775){
            CU_NAME_selected <- "Bella Coola-Dean Rivers"
          }else if(cond_SX_3077 | cond_SX_3085){
            CU_NAME_selected <- "Takla/Trembleur-Early Stuart Timing"
          }else if(cond_SX_7640 | cond_SX_7639){
            CU_NAME_selected <- "Shuswap Complex-Late Timing"
          }else if(cond_SX_45013 | cond_SX_46248){
            CU_NAME_selected <- "Adams-Early Summer"
          }else if(cond_SX_46268 | cond_SX_46308){
            CU_NAME_selected <- "Shuswap Complex-Early Summer Timing"
          }else if(cond_SX_7491){
            CU_NAME_selected <- "Stephens"
          }else if(cond_SX_7823){
            CU_NAME_selected <- "Fraser_Early Summer<<Extirpated>>"
          }else if(cond_SX_7833){
            CU_NAME_selected <- "Damdochax/Winimasik"
          }else if(cond_CN_46658){
            CU_NAME_selected <- "North Thompson_SU_1.3"
          }else if(cond_SX_46279){
            CU_NAME_selected <- "Shuswap Complex-Late Timing"
          }else if(cond_SX_7490){
            CU_NAME_selected <- "Takla/Trembleur/Stuart-Summer Timing"
          }
          
          if(!is.na(CU_NAME_selected)){
            cond <- CUs_gdb[cond_rg_sp,][layer_CU[[1]],]$DFO_CU_NAME == CU_NAME_selected
            # CU_NAME_selected <- CUs_gdb[cond_rg_sp,][layer_CU[[1]],]$CU_NAME[cond]
            comment <- paste0(comment,"; CU selected: ",CU_NAME_selected)
            layer_CU[[1]] <- layer_CU[[1]][cond]
          }
        }
        
        # plot(st_geometry(regions_shp[layer_rg,]))
        # plot(st_geometry(point), add = T, col = "red", pch = 16, cex = 1)
        # plot(st_geometry(CUs_gdb[cond_rg_sp,][layer_CU[[1]],]), add = T, col = alpha("blue",.3))
        # plot( st_buffer(x =  CUs_gdb[cond_rg_sp,][layer_CU[[1]],], dist = dist),
        #       add = T, col = alpha("green",alpha = .3), pch = 16, cex = 1)
        
        if(length(layer_CU[[1]]) == 0){
          print("Still no match in CUs_GBD - BREAK")
          knitr::knit_exit()
          break
        }
        
        # if still more than one choice
        if(length(layer_CU[[1]]) > 1){
          
            print("Still more than one CU in CUs_GBD - BREAK")
            knitr::knit_exit()
            break
          
          # if(!cond_SX_7490){
          #   print("Still more than one CU in CUs_GBD - BREAK")
          #   knitr::knit_exit()
          #   break
          #   
          #   comment <- paste(comment,"More than one CU layer and not sure which one to choose: ",sep = "; ")
          #   CUs <- paste(CUs_gdb[cond_rg_sp,]$DFO_CU_NAME[layer_CU[[1]]],collapse = "; ")
          #   comment <- paste(comment,CUs,collapse = "")
          # }
          
          # layer_CU
          # CUs_gdb[cond_rg_sp,]$CU_NAME[layer_CU[[1]]]
          # CUs_gdb[cond_rg_sp,]$cu_name_pse[layer_CU]
          
          # CUs_gdb[cond_rg_sp,][layer_CU,]
          # 
          # trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$IndexId[r]
          # cond <- all_areas_nuseds$IndexId == trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$IndexId[r]
          # all_areas_nuseds$POPULATION[cond] |> unique()
          
        }else{
          layer_CU <- layer_CU[[1]]
          
          # trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$CU_NAME[r] <-  CUs_gdb[cond_rg_sp,]$DFO_CU_NAME[layer_CU]
          trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$cuid[r] <- CUs_gdb[cond_rg_sp,]$CUID[layer_CU]
          trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$cu_name_pse[r] <- CUs_gdb[cond_rg_sp,]$cu_name_pse[layer_CU]
          # trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$FULL_CU_IN[r] <- CUs_gdb[cond_rg_sp,]$DFO_FULL_CU_IN[layer_CU]
          
          if(is.na(comment)){
            comment <- "CU found"
          }else{
            comment <- paste("CU found:",comment)
          }
        }
      } # end of if any(cond_rg_sp)
    } # end of if region found
  } # end of if else there is a FULL_CU_IN
  trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$comment[r] <- comment
}

trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$comment <- gsub("NA; ","",trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$comment)
unique(trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$comment)
sum(is.na(trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$comment)) # should be 0

n_noCU <- sum(grepl("CU not found",trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$comment))
```

Below we show the `r n_noCU` time series for which we could not attribute a CU:

```{r, echo=F}
rows <- which(grepl("CU not found",trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$comment))
par(mar = c(5,5,3,.5))
for(r in rows){
  iid <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$IndexId[r]
  gfeid <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$GFE_ID[r]
  WATERBODY <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$WATERBODY[r]
  POPULATION <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$POPULATION[r]
  comment <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$comment[r]
  comment <- gsub("CU not found: ","",comment)
  print(paste("The issue for the series below is:",comment))
  
  plot_IndexId_GFE_ID_fun(IndexIds = iid, GFE_IDs = gfeid,all_areas_nuseds = all_areas_nuseds)
  mtext("IndexId - GFE_ID", side = 3, line = 1, adj = 0)
  mtext("POPULATION", side = 3, line = 1, adj = .5)
  mtext("WATERBODY", side = 3, line = 1, adj = 1)
  
  legend("top",POPULATION,bty = "n")
  legend("topright",WATERBODY,bty = "n")
}

if(length(rows) == 0){
  print("There are not any.")
}
```

```{r, include=FALSE}
#'* Now we have to find the CU_NAME and FULL_CU_IN from CUSS and trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss *
#'
trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss_copy2 <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss
# trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss_copy2

cond <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$FULL_CU_IN == "" & !is.na(trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$cuid)
cuids <- unique(trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$cuid[cond])
trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$comment_cu <- NA
length(cuids) # 84

for(cuid in cuids){
  # cuid <- cuids[1]
  # cuid <- 523
  r <- which(cuid == cuids)
  # print(paste0("*** r = ",r," ***"))
  
  cond <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$cuid == cuid & !is.na(trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$cuid)
  cu_name_pse <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$cu_name_pse[cond] |> unique()
  species_name <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$species_name[cond] |> unique()
  IndexId <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$IndexId[cond] |> unique()
  
  cond_decoder <- conservationunits_decoder$cuid == cuid & !is.na(conservationunits_decoder$cuid)
  cu_name_dfo <- conservationunits_decoder$cu_name_dfo[cond_decoder] |> unique()
  species_qualified <- conservationunits_decoder$species_qualified[cond_decoder] |> unique()
  cu_index <- conservationunits_decoder$cu_index[cond_decoder] |> unique()
  
  if(!is.na(cu_index)){
    cond_cuss <- conservation_unit_census_sites_all$FULL_CU_IN == cu_index
  }else{
    cond_cuss <- F
  }
  
  if(!any(cond_cuss)){
    cond_cuss <- simplify_string_fun(conservation_unit_census_sites_all$CU_NAME) == simplify_string_fun(cu_name_dfo) & 
      conservation_unit_census_sites_all$SPECIES_QUALIFIED == species_qualified
  }
  
  cond_308 <- cuid == 308
  if(cond_308){
    cond_cuss <- conservation_unit_census_sites_all$CU_NAME == "MIDDLE FRASER-FRASER CANYON_SP_1.3" & 
      conservation_unit_census_sites_all$SPECIES_QUALIFIED == species_qualified
  }
  
  cond_301 <- cuid == 301
  if(cond_301){
    cond_cuss <- conservation_unit_census_sites_all$CU_NAME == "OKANAGAN_0.x" & 
      conservation_unit_census_sites_all$SPECIES_QUALIFIED == species_qualified
  }
  
  cond_609 <- cuid == 609
  if(cond_609){
    cond_cuss <- conservation_unit_census_sites_all$CU_NAME == "HECATE STRAIT-FJORDS" & 
      conservation_unit_census_sites_all$SPECIES_QUALIFIED == species_qualified
  }
  
  cond_219 <- cuid == 219
  if(cond_219){
    cond_cuss <- conservation_unit_census_sites_all$CU_NAME == "NASS-SKEENA ESTUARY" & 
      conservation_unit_census_sites_all$SPECIES_QUALIFIED == species_qualified
  }
  
  cond_608 <- cuid == 608
  if(cond_608){
    cond_cuss <- conservation_unit_census_sites_all$CU_NAME == "HECATE LOWLANDS" & 
      conservation_unit_census_sites_all$SPECIES_QUALIFIED == species_qualified
  }
  
  cond_218 <- cuid == 218
  if(cond_218){
    cond_cuss <- conservation_unit_census_sites_all$CU_NAME == "MIDDLE-UPPER SKEENA" & 
      conservation_unit_census_sites_all$SPECIES_QUALIFIED == species_qualified
  }
  
  cond_610 <- cuid == 610
  if(cond_610){
    cond_cuss <- conservation_unit_census_sites_all$CU_NAME == "HOMATHKO-KLINAKLINI-SMITH-RIVERS-BELLA COOLA-DEAN" & 
      conservation_unit_census_sites_all$SPECIES_QUALIFIED == species_qualified
  }
  
  cond_528 <- cuid == 528
  if(cond_528){
    cond_cuss <- conservation_unit_census_sites_all$CU_NAME == "GREAT CENTRAL/SPROAT" & 
      conservation_unit_census_sites_all$SPECIES_QUALIFIED == species_qualified
  }
  
  if(!any(cond_cuss)){
    print(paste0("(r = ",r,") CU_NAME not found for: ",species_name," - ",cu_name_pse," - ",cu_name_dfo," - ",cuid))
    
    trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$comment_cu[cond] <- "CU not in CUSS"
    
    # Should be:
    # [1] "(r = 8) CU not found for: Chum - Upper Skeena - Upper Skeena - 242"
    # [1] "(r = 72) CU not found for: Sockeye - Momich-Early summer - Momich - Early Summer <<Extinct>> - 761"
    # [1] "(r = 80) CU not found for: Sockeye - South Atnarko Lakes - South Atnarko Lakes (Sockeye-Lake) - 528"
    
  }else{
    
    # if(grepl("PKE",IndexId)){
    #   cond_cuss <- cond_cuss & conservation_unit_census_sites_all$SPECIES_QUALIFIED == "PKE"
    # }else if(grepl("PKO",IndexId)){
    #   cond_cuss <- cond_cuss & conservation_unit_census_sites_all$SPECIES_QUALIFIED == "PKO"
    # }
    
    FULL_CU_IN <- conservation_unit_census_sites_all$FULL_CU_IN[cond_cuss] |> unique()
    
    if(length(FULL_CU_IN) != 1){
      print("More than one choice - BREAK")
      knitr::knit_exit()
      break
    }
    
    trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$FULL_CU_IN[cond] <- FULL_CU_IN
    trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$CU_NAME[cond] <- conservation_unit_census_sites_all$CU_NAME[cond_cuss] |> unique()
    trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$comment_cu[cond] <- "CU found in CUSS"
  }
}

# CU with a CUID that are not in CUSS
cond <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$FULL_CU_IN == "" & !is.na(trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$cuid)
cuids <- unique(trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$cuid[cond])
```

There are `r length(cuids)` CUs (`r sum(cond)` time series) having a `cu_name_pse` and `cuid` but for who we could not find a `CU_NAME` and `FULL_CU_IN` in **CUSS**:

```{r, echo=FALSE, fig.width=10}
par(mar = c(5,5,3,.5))

for(cuid in cuids){
  # cuid <- cuids[1]
  cond_cuid <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$cuid[cond] == cuid
  
  iid <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$IndexId[cond][cond_cuid]
  gfeid <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$GFE_ID[cond][cond_cuid]
  WATERBODY <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$WATERBODY[cond][cond_cuid]
  POPULATION <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$POPULATION[cond][cond_cuid]
  
  cu_name_pse <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$cu_name_pse[cond][cond_cuid] |> unique()
  
  print(paste0("The series below is/are associated to CU ",cu_name_pse," (cuid = ",cuid,") in the PSE:"))
  
  plot_IndexId_GFE_ID_fun(IndexIds = iid, GFE_IDs = gfeid,all_areas_nuseds = all_areas_nuseds)
  mtext("IndexId - GFE_ID", side = 3, line = 1, adj = 0)
  mtext("POPULATION", side = 3, line = 1, adj = .5)
  mtext("WATERBODY", side = 3, line = 1, adj = 1)
  
  legend("top",POPULATION,bty = "n")
  legend("topright",WATERBODY,bty = "n")
}
```

```{r, include=FALSE}
# CU without a CUID that are not in CUSS
cond <- is.na(trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$cuid)
show <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss[cond,]
rownames(show) <- NULL
show
```

Finally, there are `r nrow(show)` time series with a `CU_NAME` and `FULL_CU_IN` that are not in **CUSS** and for which we could not find the corresponding `cuid` and `cu_name_pse` in the PSE:

```{r, echo=FALSE}
show
```

```{r, echo=FALSE, fig.width=10}
IndexIds <- unique(show$IndexId)

for(iid in IndexIds){
  
  cond <- show$IndexId == iid
  IndexId <- show$IndexId[cond]
  GFE_ID <- show$GFE_ID[cond]
  
  CU_NAME <- show$CU_NAME[cond] |> unique()
  FULL_CU_IN <- show$FULL_CU_IN[cond] |> unique()
  
  print(paste0("The series below have CU_NAME = ",CU_NAME," and FULL_CU_IN = ",FULL_CU_IN))
  
  plot_IndexId_GFE_ID_fun(IndexIds = IndexId, GFE_IDs = GFE_ID, 
                          all_areas_nuseds = all_areas_nuseds)
   
  WATERBODY <- show$WATERBODY[cond]
  POPULATION <- show$POPULATION[cond]
  
  mtext("IndexId - GFE_ID", side = 3, line = 1, adj = 0)
  mtext("POPULATION", side = 3, line = 1, adj = .5)
  mtext("WATERBODY", side = 3, line = 1, adj = 1)
  
  legend("top",POPULATION,bty = "n")
  legend("topright",WATERBODY,bty = "n")
}
```


The reference of all these time series (i.e., `IndexId/POP_ID` & `GFE_ID` and associated fields) are added to **CUSS** in the next step.

### Add the references of the missing time series to CUSS

```{r, echo=F}
# Series with FULL_CU_IN and with a cuid
cond_withCU <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$FULL_CU_IN != "" & !is.na(trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$cuid)
cuids <- unique(trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$cuid[cond_withCU])
```

First we add to **CUSS** the references of the `r sum(cond_withCU)` time series for which we found the `CU_NAME` and `FULL_CU_IN` in **CUSS** and the `cuid` and `cu_name_pse` in the PSE.

```{r, include = F}

# We add the PSE fields to CUSS:
conservation_unit_census_sites$cuid <- NA
conservation_unit_census_sites$cu_name_pse <- NA

conservation_unit_census_sites_copy1 <- conservation_unit_census_sites
# conservation_unit_census_sites <- conservation_unit_census_sites_copy1

sum(is.na(conservation_unit_census_sites$cuid)) # 7149
nrow(conservation_unit_census_sites) # 7149

added_all <- data.frame()

data <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss[cond_withCU,]
for(r in 1:nrow(data)){
  # r <- 1
  
  # print(paste0("*** r = ",r," ***"))
  
  IndexId <- data$IndexId[r]
  GFE_ID <- data$GFE_ID[r]
  CU_NAME <- data$CU_NAME[r]
  FULL_CU_IN <- data$FULL_CU_IN[r]
  cuid <- data$cuid[r]
  species_name <- data$species_name[r]
  comment <- data$comment[r]
  
  cond_decoder <- conservationunits_decoder$cuid == cuid & !is.na(conservationunits_decoder$cuid)
  species_qualified <- conservationunits_decoder$species_qualified[cond_decoder] |> unique()
  cu_name_pse <- conservationunits_decoder$cu_name_pse[cond_decoder] |> unique()
    
  toAdd <- data.frame(IndexId = IndexId,
                      GFE_ID = GFE_ID,
                      dataset = "CUSS",
                      CU_NAME = CU_NAME,
                      comment = comment)
  added_all <- rbind(added_all,toAdd)
  
  # create a new row for CUSS
  cuss_new <- CUSS_newRow_fun(IndexId = IndexId, 
                              GFE_ID = GFE_ID, 
                              conservation_unit_system_sites = conservation_unit_census_sites,
                              all_areas_nuseds = all_areas_nuseds)
  
  #' Check if GFE_ID was already in CUSS; if not, need to fill the associated fields manually
  cond_here <- conservation_unit_census_sites$GFE_ID == GFE_ID
  #' Note that certain fields associated to the infered simply from the available data:
  #' - FAZ_ACRO MAZ_ACRO JAZ_ACRO --> those are CU )INdexId related)
  #' - GFE_TYPE (may be it is in the other source datasets?)
  # if(any(cond_here)){
  #   print("GFE_ID present - BREAK")
  #   break
  # }
  if(!any(cond_here)){
    cuss_new$Y_LAT <- data$Y_LAT[r]
    cuss_new$X_LONGT <- data$X_LONGT[r]
    cuss_new$coordinates_changed <- F
    if(data$coordinates_from[r] == "Manually defined"){
      cuss_new$coordinates_changed <- T
    }
    
    cond_nuseds <- all_areas_nuseds$GFE_ID == GFE_ID
    cuss_new$WATERSHED_CDE <- all_areas_nuseds$WATERSHED_CDE[cond_nuseds] |> unique()
    cuss_new$FWA_WATERSHED_CDE <- all_areas_nuseds$FWA_WATERSHED_CDE[cond_nuseds] |> unique()
  }
  
  # Check if IndexId was already in CUSS; if not, need to fill the associated CU-related fields manually
  cond_here <- conservation_unit_census_sites$IndexId == IndexId
  #' Note that the following fields associated to the IndexId/POP_ID cannot be found
  #' if the it is not in CUSS:
  #' - IS_INDICATOR
  # if(any(cond_here) & !any(conservation_unit_census_sites$GFE_ID == GFE_ID)){
  #   print("IndexId present - BREAK")
  #   break
  # }
  if(!any(cond_here)){
    # 
    cuss_new$SPECIES_QUALIFIED <- species_qualified
    cuss_new$CU_NAME <- CU_NAME
    cuss_new$FULL_CU_IN <- FULL_CU_IN
    
    cond_CU <- conservation_unit_census_sites_all$FULL_CU_IN == FULL_CU_IN
    cuss_new$CU_ACRO <- conservation_unit_census_sites_all$CU_ACRO[cond_CU] |> unique()
    cuss_new$CU_LAT <- conservation_unit_census_sites_all$CU_LAT[cond_CU] |> unique()
    cuss_new$CU_LONGT <- conservation_unit_census_sites_all$CU_LONGT[cond_CU] |> unique()
    cuss_new$CU_TYPE <- conservation_unit_census_sites_all$CU_TYPE[cond_CU] |> unique()
    cuss_new$CU_INDEX <- conservation_unit_census_sites_all$CU_INDEX[cond_CU] |> unique()
    cuss_new$SBJ_ID <- (1:5)[species_name == c("Sockeye","Coho","Pink","Chum","Chinook")]
    # cuss_new$EFFECTIVE_DT <- conservation_unit_census_sites_all$EFFECTIVE_DT[cond_CU] |> unique() # potential multiple dates so leave as NA
  }
  
  cuss_new$cuid <- cuid
  cuss_new$cu_name_pse <- cu_name_pse
  
  conservation_unit_census_sites <- rbind(conservation_unit_census_sites,cuss_new)
}

sum(is.na(conservation_unit_census_sites$cuid)) # 7149
nrow(conservation_unit_census_sites) # 7401

# check that all the series are now in CUSS
seriestocheck <- paste(data$IndexId,data$GFE_ID, sep = "_")
series_cuss <- unique(paste(conservation_unit_census_sites$IndexId,conservation_unit_census_sites$GFE_ID, sep = "_"))
all(seriestocheck %in% series_cuss) # TRUE
```

```{r, echo=F}
# Series without FULL_CU_IN but with cuid 
cond_withoutCU <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$FULL_CU_IN == "" & !is.na(trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$cuid)
cuids <- unique(trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$cuid[cond_withoutCU])
```

Second we add to **CUSS** the references of the `r sum(cond_withoutCU)` time series for which we did not find the `CU_NAME` and `FULL_CU_IN` but for which we found the `cuid` and `cu_name_pse`.

```{r, include = F}
conservation_unit_census_sites_copy2 <- conservation_unit_census_sites
# conservation_unit_census_sites <- conservation_unit_census_sites_copy2

data <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss[cond_withoutCU,]
for(r in 1:nrow(data)){
  # r <- 1
  
  # print(paste0("*** r = ",r," ***"))
  
  IndexId <- data$IndexId[r]
  GFE_ID <- data$GFE_ID[r]
  cuid <- data$cuid[r]
  species_name <- data$species_name[r]
  comment <- paste(data$comment[r],"in the PSE but not in CUSS")
  
  cond_decoder <- conservationunits_decoder$cuid == cuid & !is.na(conservationunits_decoder$cuid)
  species_qualified <- conservationunits_decoder$species_qualified[cond_decoder] |> unique()
  cu_name_pse <- conservationunits_decoder$cu_name_pse[cond_decoder] |> unique()
  
  toAdd <- data.frame(IndexId = IndexId,
                      GFE_ID = GFE_ID,
                      dataset = "CUSS",
                      CU_NAME = CU_NAME,
                      comment = comment)
  added_all <- rbind(added_all,toAdd)
  
  # create a new row for CUSS
  cuss_new <- CUSS_newRow_fun(IndexId = IndexId, 
                              GFE_ID = GFE_ID, 
                              conservation_unit_system_sites = conservation_unit_census_sites,
                              all_areas_nuseds = all_areas_nuseds)
  
  #' Check if GFE_ID was already in CUSS; if not, need to fill the associated fields manually
  cond_here <- conservation_unit_census_sites$GFE_ID == GFE_ID
  if(!any(cond_here)){
    cuss_new$Y_LAT <- data$Y_LAT[r]
    cuss_new$X_LONGT <- data$X_LONGT[r]
    cuss_new$coordinates_changed <- F
    if(data$coordinates_from[r] == "Manually defined"){
      cuss_new$coordinates_changed <- T
    }
    
    cond_nuseds <- all_areas_nuseds$GFE_ID == GFE_ID
    cuss_new$WATERSHED_CDE <- all_areas_nuseds$WATERSHED_CDE[cond_nuseds] |> unique()
    cuss_new$FWA_WATERSHED_CDE <- all_areas_nuseds$FWA_WATERSHED_CDE[cond_nuseds] |> unique()
  }
  
  # Check if IndexId was already in CUSS; if not, need to fill the associated CU-related fields manually
  cond_here <- conservation_unit_census_sites$IndexId == IndexId
  if(!any(cond_here)){
    # 
    cuss_new$SPECIES_QUALIFIED <- species_qualified
    # cuss_new$CU_NAME <- CU_NAME
    # cuss_new$FULL_CU_IN <- FULL_CU_IN
    # 
    # cond_CU <- conservation_unit_census_sites_all$FULL_CU_IN == FULL_CU_IN
    # cuss_new$CU_ACRO <- conservation_unit_census_sites_all$CU_ACRO[cond_CU] |> unique()
    # cuss_new$CU_LAT <- conservation_unit_census_sites_all$CU_LAT[cond_CU] |> unique()
    # cuss_new$CU_LONGT <- conservation_unit_census_sites_all$CU_LONGT[cond_CU] |> unique()
    # cuss_new$CU_TYPE <- conservation_unit_census_sites_all$CU_TYPE[cond_CU] |> unique()
    # cuss_new$CU_INDEX <- conservation_unit_census_sites_all$CU_INDEX[cond_CU] |> unique()

    cuss_new$SBJ_ID <- (1:5)[species_name == c("Sockeye","Coho","Pink","Chum","Chinook")]
  }
  
  cuss_new$cuid <- cuid
  cuss_new$cu_name_pse <- cu_name_pse
  
  conservation_unit_census_sites <- rbind(conservation_unit_census_sites,cuss_new)
}

sum(is.na(conservation_unit_census_sites$cuid)) # 7149
nrow(conservation_unit_census_sites) # 7406

# check 
seriestocheck <- paste(data$IndexId,data$GFE_ID, sep = "_")
series_cuss <- unique(paste(conservation_unit_census_sites$IndexId,conservation_unit_census_sites$GFE_ID, sep = "_"))
all(seriestocheck %in% series_cuss) # TRUE
```

```{r, include=F}
# Series with FULL_CU_IN but without cuid (they have a FULL_CU_IN)
cond_withoutCUID <- is.na(trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$cuid)
IndexId <- unique(trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$IndexId[cond_withoutCUID])
trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss[cond_withoutCUID,]
```

Finally, the `r sum(cond_withoutCUID)` time series with a `CU_NAME` and `FULL_CU_IN` for which we could not find the corresponding `cuid` and `cu_name_pse` are added to **CUSS**.

```{r, include = F}
conservation_unit_census_sites_copy3 <- conservation_unit_census_sites
# conservation_unit_census_sites <- conservation_unit_census_sites_copy3

data <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss[cond_withoutCUID,]
for(r in 1:nrow(data)){
  # r <- 1
  # r <- which(data$IndexId == "SX_3302")[1]
  # print(paste0("*** r = ",r," ***"))
  
  IndexId <- data$IndexId[r]
  GFE_ID <- data$GFE_ID[r]
  cuid <- data$cuid[r]
  cu_name_pse <- data$cu_name_pse[r]
  species_name <- data$species_name[r]
  comment <- data$comment[r]
  CU_NAME <- data$CU_NAME[r]
  
  toAdd <- data.frame(IndexId = IndexId,
                      GFE_ID = GFE_ID,
                      dataset = "CUSS",
                      CU_NAME = CU_NAME,
                      comment = comment)
  added_all <- rbind(added_all,toAdd)
  
  # create a new row for CUSS
  cuss_new <- CUSS_newRow_fun(IndexId = IndexId, 
                              GFE_ID = GFE_ID, 
                              conservation_unit_system_sites = conservation_unit_census_sites,
                              all_areas_nuseds = all_areas_nuseds)
  
  #' Check if GFE_ID was already in CUSS; if not, need to fill the associated fields manually
  cond_here <- conservation_unit_census_sites$GFE_ID == GFE_ID
  if(!any(cond_here)){
    cuss_new$Y_LAT <- data$Y_LAT[r]
    cuss_new$X_LONGT <- data$X_LONGT[r]
    cuss_new$coordinates_changed <- F
    if(data$coordinates_from[r] == "Manually defined"){
      cuss_new$coordinates_changed <- T
    }
    
    cond_nuseds <- all_areas_nuseds$GFE_ID == GFE_ID
    cuss_new$WATERSHED_CDE <- all_areas_nuseds$WATERSHED_CDE[cond_nuseds] |> unique()
    cuss_new$FWA_WATERSHED_CDE <- all_areas_nuseds$FWA_WATERSHED_CDE[cond_nuseds] |> unique()
  }
  
  # Check if IndexId was already in CUSS; if not, need to fill the associated CU-related fields manually
  cond_here <- conservation_unit_census_sites$IndexId == IndexId
  if(!any(cond_here)){
    # 
    cuss_new$SPECIES_QUALIFIED <- species_qualified
    cuss_new$CU_NAME <- CU_NAME
    cuss_new$FULL_CU_IN <- FULL_CU_IN
    
    cond_CU <- conservation_unit_census_sites_all$FULL_CU_IN == FULL_CU_IN
    cuss_new$CU_ACRO <- conservation_unit_census_sites_all$CU_ACRO[cond_CU] |> unique()
    cuss_new$CU_LAT <- conservation_unit_census_sites_all$CU_LAT[cond_CU] |> unique()
    cuss_new$CU_LONGT <- conservation_unit_census_sites_all$CU_LONGT[cond_CU] |> unique()
    cuss_new$CU_TYPE <- conservation_unit_census_sites_all$CU_TYPE[cond_CU] |> unique()
    cuss_new$CU_INDEX <- conservation_unit_census_sites_all$CU_INDEX[cond_CU] |> unique()
    cuss_new$SBJ_ID <- (1:5)[species_name == c("Sockeye","Coho","Pink","Chum","Chinook")]
  }
  
  cuss_new$cuid <- cuid
  cuss_new$cu_name_pse <- cu_name_pse
  
  conservation_unit_census_sites <- rbind(conservation_unit_census_sites,cuss_new)
}

sum(is.na(conservation_unit_census_sites$cuid)) # 7151
nrow(conservation_unit_census_sites) # 7408

# check 
seriestocheck <- paste(data$IndexId,data$GFE_ID, sep = "_")
series_cuss <- unique(paste(conservation_unit_census_sites$IndexId,conservation_unit_census_sites$GFE_ID, sep = "_"))
all(seriestocheck %in% series_cuss) # TRUE
```

So now all the time series in **NUSEDS** should be referenced in **CUSS**, is that true?

```{r, echo=FALSE}
series_nuseds <- paste(all_areas_nuseds$IndexId,all_areas_nuseds$GFE_ID)
series_cuss <- paste(conservation_unit_census_sites$IndexId, conservation_unit_census_sites$GFE_ID)

if(all(series_nuseds %in% series_cuss)){
  print("YES :-)")
}else{
  print("NO :-(")
}
```

### Find the cuid and cu_name of all the IndexId/POP_ID in CUSS and NUSEDS

In this section we attempt to find the PSE's `cuid` and `cu_name_pse` to all CUs (`FULL_IN_IN` and `CU_NAME`) in **CUSS**. We then fill the missing information for the fields `FULL_CU_IN`, `cuid` and `cu_name_pse` in **NUSEDS**.

```{r, include=FALSE}
#' Now we edit the missing cuid and cu_name in CUSS for the IndexId/POP_ID that 
#' have been associated to a cuid in the previous step. We also check that a 
#' IndexId/POP_ID is not assocated to mutliple CUs.

conservation_unit_census_sites_copy4 <- conservation_unit_census_sites
# conservation_unit_census_sites <- conservation_unit_census_sites_copy4

IndexIds <- unique(conservation_unit_census_sites$IndexId)
for(ii in IndexIds){
  # ii <- IndexIds
  cond <- conservation_unit_census_sites$IndexId == ii
  FULL_CU_IN <- conservation_unit_census_sites$FULL_CU_IN[cond] |> unique()
  cuid <- conservation_unit_census_sites$cuid[cond] |> unique()
  cuid <- cuid[!is.na(cuid)]
  
  FULL_CU_IN_cuid <- unique(conservation_unit_census_sites[cond,c("FULL_CU_IN","cuid")])
  
  if(length(cuid) > 1){
    print("More than on cuid - BREAK")
    print(unique(conservation_unit_census_sites[cond,c("IndexId","CU_NAME","FULL_CU_IN","cuid","cu_name_pse","GFE_ID","CENSUS_SITE")]))
    knitr::knit_exit()
    break
    
  }else if(length(FULL_CU_IN) > 1){
    print("More than on FULL_CU_IN - BREAK")
    print(unique(conservation_unit_census_sites[cond,c("IndexId","CU_NAME","FULL_CU_IN","cuid","cu_name_pse","GFE_ID","CENSUS_SITE")]))
    knitr::knit_exit()
    break
    
  }else{
    
    if(sum(cond) > 1 & length(cuid) > 0){ # a IndexId/POP_ID is associated to a cuid and NA
     
      cu_name_pse <- conservation_unit_census_sites$cu_name_pse[cond] |> unique()
      cu_name_pse <- cu_name_pse[!is.na(cu_name_pse)]
      
      cond_NA <- is.na(conservation_unit_census_sites$cuid) # not really necessary but just in case
      conservation_unit_census_sites$cuid[cond & cond_NA] <- cuid
      conservation_unit_census_sites$cu_name_pse[cond & cond_NA] <- cu_name_pse
      
      # print(unique(conservation_unit_census_sites[cond,c("IndexId","CU_NAME","FULL_CU_IN","cuid","cu_name_pse","GFE_ID","CENSUS_SITE")]))
    }
  }
}

sum(is.na(conservation_unit_census_sites$cuid)) # 7110 (vs. 7151 before filling the cuid)
nrow(conservation_unit_census_sites) # 7408
```

```{r, include=FALSE}
#' Then we find the cuid and cu_name_pse for the rest of the IndexId/POP_ID using
#' decoder

cond_na <- is.na(conservation_unit_census_sites$cuid)
IndexId_cu <- unique(conservation_unit_census_sites[!cond_na,c("IndexId","CU_NAME","FULL_CU_IN","cuid","cu_name_pse","SPECIES_QUALIFIED")])
IndexId_cu_na <- unique(conservation_unit_census_sites[cond_na,c("IndexId","CU_NAME","FULL_CU_IN","cuid","cu_name_pse","SPECIES_QUALIFIED")])
nrow(IndexId_cu) # 244 (vs 7095 ???)
length(unique(IndexId_cu_na$IndexId)) # 7096 (vs 7095 ?!)

#' make sure that none of the IndexId/POP_ID for which we found a cuid are also 
#' associated to cuid = NA in CUSS:
any(IndexId_cu$IndexId %in% IndexId_cu_na$IndexId)
# should be FALSE

conservation_unit_census_sites_copy5 <- conservation_unit_census_sites
# conservation_unit_census_sites <- conservation_unit_census_sites_copy5

for(r in 1:nrow(IndexId_cu_na)){
  # r <- 1
  IndexId <- IndexId_cu_na$IndexId[r]
  CU_NAME <- IndexId_cu_na$CU_NAME[r]
  FULL_CU_IN <- IndexId_cu_na$FULL_CU_IN[r]
  SPECIES_QUALIFIED <- IndexId_cu_na$SPECIES_QUALIFIED[r]
  
  # print(paste("***",r,"***"))
  
  # check if the IndexId is in all_area_nuseds. Don't bother if not.
  cond_nuseds <- all_areas_nuseds$IndexId == IndexId
  
  POP_ID <- unique(all_areas_nuseds$POP_ID[cond_nuseds])
  
  # Exclude the hatchery CUs 
  cond_exclude <- FULL_CU_IN %in% paste0("CK-900",1:9) | # hatchery
    FULL_CU_IN == "CM-9004" | 
    FULL_CU_IN == "PKE-9005" |
    FULL_CU_IN %in% paste0("SEL-",c("03-xx","06-04","06-05","06-18","07-02","11-10","11-11","11-12","13-21","15-03","18-11")) |
    FULL_CU_IN %in% paste0("SER-",c("05","06")) |
    IndexId == "SX_3302"
   
  if(any(cond_nuseds) & !cond_exclude){ # it is possible that the IndexId/POP_ID is not in NUSEDS
    
    #'* Try to find the cuid using the decoder *
    
    # Corrections
    FULL_CU_IN_PSE <- FULL_CU_IN
    if(FULL_CU_IN %in% paste0("CK-0",1:9)){
      FULL_CU_IN_PSE <- gsub("0","",FULL_CU_IN)
    }else if(FULL_CU_IN %in% paste0("CM-0",1:9)){
      FULL_CU_IN_PSE <- gsub("0","",FULL_CU_IN)
    }else if(FULL_CU_IN %in% paste0("CO-0",1:9)){
      FULL_CU_IN_PSE <- gsub("0","",FULL_CU_IN)
    }else if(FULL_CU_IN %in% paste0("PKE-0",1:9)){
      FULL_CU_IN_PSE <- gsub("0","",FULL_CU_IN)
    }else if(FULL_CU_IN %in% paste0("PKO-0",1:9)){
      FULL_CU_IN_PSE <- gsub("0","",FULL_CU_IN)
    }else if(POP_ID %in% update_for_FULL_CU_IN_l()$`SEL-21-02-EW`){  # the updated FULL_CU_IN for the PSE are in update_for_FULL_CU_IN_l()
      FULL_CU_IN_PSE <- "SEL-21-02-EW"
    }else if(POP_ID %in% update_for_FULL_CU_IN_l()$`SEL-21-02-LW`){
      FULL_CU_IN_PSE <- "SEL-21-02-LW"
    }else if(POP_ID %in% update_for_FULL_CU_IN_l()$`SEL-21-02-F`){
      FULL_CU_IN_PSE <- "SEL-21-02-F"
    }else if(POP_ID %in% update_for_FULL_CU_IN_l()$`CM-16`){
      FULL_CU_IN_PSE <- "CM-16"
    }else if(POP_ID %in% update_for_FULL_CU_IN_l()$`CM-17`){
      FULL_CU_IN_PSE <- "CM-17"
    }
    
    #' try With FULL_CU_IN
    cond_decoder <- FULL_CU_IN_PSE == conservationunits_decoder$cu_index & !is.na(conservationunits_decoder$cu_index)
    
    #' try with CU_NAME
    if(!any(cond_decoder)){
      cond_decoder <- simplify_string_fun(CU_NAME) == simplify_string_fun(conservationunits_decoder$cu_name_dfo) & 
        conservationunits_decoder$species_qualified == SPECIES_QUALIFIED
    }
    
    if(!any(cond_decoder)){
      print("No match - BREAK")
      print(IndexId_cu_na[r,])
      knitr::knit_exit()
      break
      
    }else{
      cond <- conservation_unit_census_sites$IndexId == IndexId
      conservation_unit_census_sites$cuid[cond] <- conservationunits_decoder$cuid[cond_decoder] |> unique()
      conservation_unit_census_sites$cu_name_pse[cond] <- conservationunits_decoder$cu_name_pse[cond_decoder] |> unique()
    }
  }
}

sum(is.na(conservation_unit_census_sites$cuid)) # 331
nrow(conservation_unit_census_sites) # 7408
```

```{r, include=FALSE}
#' Now we fill the info in NUSEDS

all_areas_nuseds$cuid <- NA
all_areas_nuseds$cu_name_pse <- NA
all_areas_nuseds$CU_NAME <- NA

all_areas_nuseds_copy1 <- all_areas_nuseds
# all_areas_nuseds <- all_areas_nuseds_copy1

IndexIds <- all_areas_nuseds$IndexId |> unique()
length(IndexIds) # 7095

for(IndexId in IndexIds){
  # IndexId <- IndexIds[1]
  
  i <- which(IndexId == IndexIds)
  
  # print(paste("***",i,"***"))
  
  cond <- conservation_unit_census_sites$IndexId == IndexId
  FULL_CU_IN <- conservation_unit_census_sites$FULL_CU_IN[cond] |> unique()
  CU_NAME <- conservation_unit_census_sites$CU_NAME[cond] |> unique()
  cuid <- conservation_unit_census_sites$cuid[cond] |> unique()
  cu_name_pse <- conservation_unit_census_sites$cu_name_pse[cond] |> unique()
  
  cond <- all_areas_nuseds$IndexId == IndexId
  
  if(FULL_CU_IN != ""){ # those with FULL_CU_IN == "" were added to CUSS and have a cuid
    FULL_CU_IN_nuseds <- all_areas_nuseds$FULL_CU_IN[cond] |> unique()
    # check 
    if(FULL_CU_IN_nuseds != "" & FULL_CU_IN_nuseds != FULL_CU_IN){
      print("FULL_CU_IN in NUSEDS != in CUSS - BREAK")
      knitr::knit_exit()
      break
    }
  }
  all_areas_nuseds$FULL_CU_IN[cond] <- FULL_CU_IN
  all_areas_nuseds$CU_NAME[cond] <- CU_NAME
  all_areas_nuseds$cuid[cond] <- cuid
  all_areas_nuseds$cu_name_pse[cond] <- cu_name_pse
}

sum(is.na(all_areas_nuseds_copy1$cuid)) # 315898
sum(is.na(all_areas_nuseds$cuid)) # 2098
nrow(all_areas_nuseds) # 315898
```


```{r, echo=FALSE}
col <- c("IndexId","GFE_ID","WATERBODY","FULL_CU_IN","CU_NAME","cu_name_pse","cuid")

cond <- all_areas_nuseds$FULL_CU_IN == ""
show <- unique(all_areas_nuseds[cond,col])
rownames(show) <- NULL
```

There are `r nrow(show)` time series without a `FULL_CU_IN` in **NUSEDS** and they should be the ones identified above, is that the case?

```{r, echo=FALSE}
series_nuseds <- paste(show$IndexId,show$GFE_ID)

cond <- trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$FULL_CU_IN == ""
series_tracked <- paste(trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$IndexId[cond],trackRecord_nuseds_nocuss$GFE_ID[cond])

if(all(series_nuseds %in% series_tracked) & all(series_tracked %in% series_nuseds)){
  print("YES :-)")
}else{
  print("NO :-(")
}
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
col <- c("IndexId","GFE_ID","WATERBODY","FULL_CU_IN","CU_NAME","cu_name_pse","cuid")

cond <- is.na(all_areas_nuseds$cuid)
show <- unique(all_areas_nuseds[cond,col])
show <- show[order(show$IndexId),]
rownames(show) <- NULL
```

There are `r nrow(show)` time series and `r length(unique(show$FULL_CU_IN))` `FULL_CU_IN` in **NUSEDS** for which we could not find a `cuid` and `cu_name_pse`:

```{r, echo=FALSE}
show
```

These series are kept in **NUSEDS**.


# Trubleshoot issues 

Normally, `POP_ID` and `GFE_ID` should be a ONE-TO-ONE relationship (i.e., a given population should be present in only one location and a CU should have only one population in any given location). By comparing the times series presenting either of these these two issues, we can spot clear errors in the data, errors that we solve by either deleting duplicated data points or merging time series.  

## Issue: CUs with multiple time series in a single location

CUs with multiple `IndexId/POP_ID` associated to a single `GFE_ID`.

There are many cases where a CU in a given location (i.e., a unique `GFE_ID`) is associated to multiple series (i.e. `IndexId`/`POP_ID`), which should not happen. Observing these cases reveals clear duplicated data points or single data point that are not worth keeping. To fix these issues we proceed as follow:

-   **Case 1**: one of the duplicated series has only one data point:

    -   if it is complementary: merge to the other (longer) series

    -   if it is in conflict or a duplicate: remove the focal series

-   **Case 2**: the shorter series is 100% duplicated: removed the focal series

-   **Case 3**: for the rest of the duplicated series,

    -   points that are conflictual or duplicated are summed up

    -   points that are complementary are merged

By summing data points in a few cases, we assume that the different runs (e.g., "Chinook Run 1" and "Chinook Run 2") can be considered a single population. For example, the Bridge River has Summer and Late run sockeye surveys, but these are both in the MIDDLE FRASER river-type sockeye CU and are summed to yield the Bridge River survey for that CU in the PSE.

The figures below show the time series before and after correction with the action made (i.e., "MERGED", "DELETED", "SUMMED") indicated.

There are a few instances where a special fix is done, as indicated below in the corresponding figures.

In the few instances where data points are summed, we define the `ESTIMATE_CLASSIFICATION` (e.g., "RELATIVE ABUNDANCE (TYPE-3)") as the value corresponding to the highest `MAX_ESTIMATE` value between the two data points. In these cases, a table follows the figure and show the data points that are summed with their corresponding `Year` and `ESTIMATE_CLASSIFICATION`.

```{r, echo=FALSE, fig.width=15, fig.height=15}
GFE_ID_CUs <- unique(all_areas_nuseds[,c("GFE_ID","FULL_CU_IN","CU_NAME","cuid","cu_name_pse")])
cond <- is.na(GFE_ID_CUs$cuid) & GFE_ID_CUs$FULL_CU_IN == ""
# any(cond) # should be F

all_areas_nuseds_copy2 <- all_areas_nuseds
removed_all_copy <- removed_all
added_all_copy <- added_all

# all_areas_nuseds <- all_areas_nuseds_copy2
# removed_all <- removed_all_copy
# added_all <- added_all_copy

count <- 1
layout(matrix(1:2,nrow = 2))
par(mar = c(4,4.5,3.5,1))
for(r in 1:nrow(GFE_ID_CUs)){
  # r <- 1
  # r <- which(GFE_ID_CUs$GFE_ID == 1194 & GFE_ID_CUs$FULL_CU_IN == "CK-25")
  # r <- which(GFE_ID_CUs$GFE_ID == 1194 & GFE_ID_CUs$FULL_CU_IN == "CK-25")
  GFE_ID <- GFE_ID_CUs$GFE_ID[r]
  FULL_CU_IN <- GFE_ID_CUs$FULL_CU_IN[r]
  CU_NAME <- GFE_ID_CUs$CU_NAME[r]
  cu_name_pse <- GFE_ID_CUs$cu_name_pse[r]
  cuid <- GFE_ID_CUs$cuid[r]
  
  if(FULL_CU_IN == ""){
    cond <- all_areas_nuseds$GFE_ID == GFE_ID & all_areas_nuseds$cuid == cuid & !is.na(all_areas_nuseds$cuid)
  }else{
    cond <- all_areas_nuseds$GFE_ID == GFE_ID & all_areas_nuseds$FULL_CU_IN == FULL_CU_IN
  }
  
  data <- unique(all_areas_nuseds[cond,c("IndexId","GFE_ID","WATERBODY","POPULATION","FULL_CU_IN","CU_NAME","cu_name_pse","cuid")])
  
  # iid_stop <- c("CN_40548","CO_50832","CO_51002","SX_50610","SX_52625","CO_52627","SX_50840","CO_45016","CO_51147","CM_50736")

  # if(any(data$IndexId %in% iid_stop)){
  #   break
  # }
  
  if(nrow(data) > 1){
    
    # print(paste0("*** count = ",count," ***"))
    show <- data[,c("IndexId","GFE_ID","FULL_CU_IN","cuid")]
    rownames(show) <- NULL
    print(show)
    
    plot_IndexId_GFE_ID_fun(IndexIds = data$IndexId, 
                            GFE_IDs = data$GFE_ID, 
                            all_areas_nuseds = all_areas_nuseds)
    
    WATERBODY <- data$WATERBODY |> unique()
    POPULATIONs <- data$POPULATION
    IndexIds <- data$IndexId
    
    # Cu name:
    if(is.na(CU_NAME)){
      cond <- conservation_unit_census_sites$cuid == cuid & !is.na(conservation_unit_census_sites$cuid)
      cu_name_text <- paste("cu_name_pse:",cu_name_pse)
    }else{
      cu_name_text <- paste("CU_NAME:",CU_NAME)
    }
    mtext(text = cu_name_text, side = 3, line = 1,adj = 0)
    
    # POPULATION
    mtext("POPULATION", side = 3, line = 1, adj = .5)
    legend("top",POPULATIONs,bty = "n")
    
    # WATERBODY
    mtext("WATERBODY", side = 3, line = 1, adj = 1)
    legend("topright",WATERBODY,bty = "n")
    
    # BEFORE
    legend("topleft",c(rep("",length(POPULATION)),"","BEFORE"),bty = "n",text.font = 2)
    
    # count
    legend("bottomleft",paste("count =",count),bty = "n")
    
    # Select the two time series:
    cond_nuseds_1 <- all_areas_nuseds$IndexId == IndexIds[1] & all_areas_nuseds$GFE_ID == GFE_ID
    cond_nuseds_2 <- all_areas_nuseds$IndexId == IndexIds[2] & all_areas_nuseds$GFE_ID == GFE_ID
    series_1 <- all_areas_nuseds$MAX_ESTIMATE[cond_nuseds_1]
    names(series_1) <- all_areas_nuseds$Year[cond_nuseds_1]
    series_2 <- all_areas_nuseds$MAX_ESTIMATE[cond_nuseds_2]
    names(series_2) <- all_areas_nuseds$Year[cond_nuseds_2]
    
    # The focal series should be the shortest one
    if(length(series_1) > length(series_2)){  # suggestion: only count the non NA values?
      IndexId_focal <- IndexIds[2]
      IndexId_compare <- IndexIds[1]
      series_focal <- series_2
      series_compare <- series_1
      cond_focal <- cond_nuseds_2
      cond_compare <- cond_nuseds_1
    }else{
      IndexId_focal <- IndexIds[1]
      IndexId_compare <- IndexIds[2]
      series_focal <- series_1
      series_compare <- series_2
      cond_focal <- cond_nuseds_1
      cond_compare <- cond_nuseds_2
    }
    
    POPULATION_focal <- POPULATIONs[IndexIds == IndexId_focal]
    POPULATION_compare <- POPULATIONs[IndexIds == IndexId_compare]
    
    comparison <- compare_series_fun(series_focal = series_focal,
                                     series_compare = series_compare)
    
    # some extra cases spotted by eye
    delete_exception1 <- IndexId_focal == "CN_50619" & GFE_ID == 824 # here one data point is a duplicate, the other one almost is
    delete_exception2 <- IndexId_focal == "CN_275" & GFE_ID == 220   # here one data point is a duplicate, the other one almost is
    correct_CM_50537_816 <- IndexId_focal == "CM_50537" & GFE_ID == 816
    
    # more complicated case with CN in SWIFT RIVER
    correct_exception_CN_SWIFT_RIVER <- IndexIds[1] %in% c("CN_2483","CN_47277","CN_47278") & GFE_ID == 142
    
    # more complicated case with CN in SWIFT RIVER
    correct_STAMP_RIVER_BELOW_FALLS <- IndexIds[1] %in% c("CN_3306","CN_3320") & GFE_ID == 11487
    
    # provide message for choice CU
    cond_CN_3334 <-  IndexIds[1] %in% c("CN_3334","CN_51519")
    
    # need to reverse the focal and compare series because of the more recent data point
    cond_CM_47925_15 <- IndexIds[1] %in% c("CM_47925","CM_47928") & GFE_ID == 15
    
    # need to reverse the focal and compare series because of unknow run timing
    # and FULL_CU_IN determined by DFO so no potient miss attribution of the CU
    # on our end
    cond_CO_41342_1358 <- IndexIds[1] %in% c("CO_41342","CO_41343") & GFE_ID == 1358
    
    # need to reverse the focal and compare series to avoid changing most recent 
    # data and the POPULATION match better CU_NAME as it contains "fall"
    # note that FULL_CU_IN already exist for both in all_area_nuseds_all
    cond_CN_40023_1208 <- IndexIds[1] %in% c("CN_40023","CN_40024") & GFE_ID == 1208
    
    if(nrow(data) > 2 & ! correct_exception_CN_SWIFT_RIVER){
      print('More than two time series - BREAK')
      knitr::knit_exit()
      break
    }
    
    if(correct_exception_CN_SWIFT_RIVER){
      
      #' this is special case where another time series of the same CU in a different 
      #' location :
      
      plot_IndexId_GFE_ID_fun(IndexIds = c("CN_47277","CN_47278","CN_47277"), 
                              GFE_IDs = c(142,142,2464), 
                              all_areas_nuseds = all_areas_nuseds)
      
      # POPULATION
      POPULATIONs_here <- sapply(c("CN_47277","CN_47278","CN_47277"),function(x){
        cond <- all_areas_nuseds$IndexId == x
        out <- unique(all_areas_nuseds$POPULATION[cond])
        return(out)
      })
      mtext("POPULATION", side = 3, line = 1, adj = .5)
      legend("top",POPULATIONs_here,bty = "n")
      
      # WATERBODY
      WATERBODY_here <- sapply(c(142,142,2464),function(x){
        cond <- all_areas_nuseds$GFE_ID == x
        out <- unique(all_areas_nuseds$WATERBODY[cond])
        return(out)
      })
      mtext("WATERBODY", side = 3, line = 1, adj = 1)
      legend("topright",WATERBODY_here,bty = "n")
      
      # BEFORE
      legend("topleft",c(rep("",length(POPULATIONs)),"","BEFORE"),bty = "n",text.font = 2)
      
      
      message1 <- "we can see in the last figure above that there is another time series (CN_47277 - 2464) of the same CU associated to the COTTONWOOD RIVER, which matches the POPULATION of both CN_47277 and CN_47278."
      message2_bold <- "**DECISIONS:**"
      message3 <- "We merge the series CN_47277 - 142 to the series CN_47277 - 2464 by changing its GFE_ID (and associated fields) from 142 to 2464."
      message4 <- "The one data point of series CN_47278 - 142 is discarded because it is in conflict with series CN_47277 - 2464 (plus ESTIMATE_METHOD = 'Area Under the Curve' vs. 'Peak Live * Expansion')."
      
      cond <- all_areas_nuseds$IndexId == "CN_47278" & all_areas_nuseds$GFE_ID == 142
      series_focal_here <- all_areas_nuseds$MAX_ESTIMATE[cond]
      names(series_focal_here) <- all_areas_nuseds$Year[cond]
      ESTIMATE_METHOD_focal <- all_areas_nuseds$ESTIMATE_METHOD[cond]
      names(ESTIMATE_METHOD_focal) <- all_areas_nuseds$Year[cond]
      ESTIMATE_CLASSIFICATION_focal <- all_areas_nuseds$ESTIMATE_CLASSIFICATION[cond]
      names(ESTIMATE_CLASSIFICATION_focal) <- all_areas_nuseds$Year[cond]
      
      cond <- all_areas_nuseds$IndexId == "CN_47277" & all_areas_nuseds$GFE_ID == 2464
      series_alter_here <- all_areas_nuseds$MAX_ESTIMATE[cond]
      names(series_alter_here) <- all_areas_nuseds$Year[cond]
      ESTIMATE_METHOD_alter <- all_areas_nuseds$ESTIMATE_METHOD[cond]
      names(ESTIMATE_METHOD_alter) <- all_areas_nuseds$Year[cond]
      ESTIMATE_CLASSIFICATION_alter <- all_areas_nuseds$ESTIMATE_CLASSIFICATION[cond]
      names(ESTIMATE_CLASSIFICATION_alter) <- all_areas_nuseds$Year[cond]
      
      # ESTIMATE_METHOD_focal['2001']
      # ESTIMATE_METHOD_alter['2001']
      # ESTIMATE_CLASSIFICATION_focal['2001']
      # ESTIMATE_CLASSIFICATION_alter['2001']
      
      # comparison <- compare_series_fun(series_focal = series_focal_here,
      #                                  series_compare = series_alter_here)
      
      print(message1)
      print(message2_bold)
      print(message3)
      print(message4)
      print("After corrections:")
      
      #' Merge CN_47277 - 142 to the series CN_47277 - 2464 in NUSEDS
      all_areas_nuseds <- fields_edit_NUSEDS_CUSS_fun(edit_NUSEDS = T, 
                                                      IndexId_focal = "CN_47277",
                                                      IndexId_alter = "CN_47277",
                                                      GFE_ID_focal = 142,
                                                      GFE_ID_alter = 2464,
                                                      all_areas_nuseds = all_areas_nuseds,
                                                      conservation_unit_system_sites = conservation_unit_census_sites)
      
      
      removed <- data.frame(IndexId = c("CN_47277"),
                            GFE_ID = c(142))
      removed$dataset <- "NUSEDS"
      removed$comment <- "Series merged to series CN_47277 & GFE_ID = 2464 because same POP_ID in multiple GFE_ID"
      removed_all <- rbind(removed_all,removed)
      
      # Remove series CN_47278 - 142
      cond <- all_areas_nuseds$IndexId == "CN_47278" & all_areas_nuseds$GFE_ID == 142
      all_areas_nuseds <- all_areas_nuseds[!cond,]
      
      removed <- data.frame(IndexId = c("CN_47278"),
                            GFE_ID = c(142))
      removed$dataset <- "NUSEDS"
      removed$comment <- "not merged to alternative series CN_47277 - 2464 because its only one data point is conflictual and different method used (run 2 vs run 1)"
      removed_all <- rbind(removed_all,removed)
      
      
      # plot
      plot_IndexId_GFE_ID_fun(IndexIds = data$IndexId, 
                              GFE_IDs = data$GFE_ID, 
                              all_areas_nuseds = all_areas_nuseds)
      mtext(text = cu_name_text, side = 3, line = 1,adj = 0)
      mtext("POPULATION", side = 3, line = 1, adj = .5)
      legend("top",POPULATIONs,bty = "n")
      mtext("WATERBODY", side = 3, line = 1, adj = 1)
      legend("topright",WATERBODY,bty = "n")
      legend("topleft",c(rep("",length(POPULATIONs)),"","AFTER"),bty = "n",text.font = 2)
      
      plot_IndexId_GFE_ID_fun(IndexIds = c("CN_47277","CN_47278","CN_47277"), 
                              GFE_IDs = c(142,142,2464), 
                              all_areas_nuseds = all_areas_nuseds)
      mtext("POPULATION", side = 3, line = 1, adj = .5)
      legend("top",POPULATIONs_here,bty = "n")
      mtext("WATERBODY", side = 3, line = 1, adj = 1)
      legend("topright",WATERBODY_here,bty = "n")
      legend("topleft",c(rep("",length(POPULATIONs)),"","AFTER"),bty = "n",text.font = 2)
      
    }else if(comparison$nb_dataPt == 1){
      
      #'* Case 1: if one data point *
      #'    - if complementary --> merge to longer series
      #'    - if conflict or duplicate --> remove
      
      # merge the focal series to series_compare
      if(comparison$complementary == 1){
        
        removed <- data.frame(IndexId = IndexId_focal,
                              GFE_ID = GFE_ID)
        removed$dataset <- "NUSEDS"
        removed$comment <- paste0("The one data point was merged to series ",
                                  IndexId_compare," & GFE_ID = ",GFE_ID,
                                  " as it is the same CU: ",cu_name_text)
        removed_all <- rbind(removed_all,removed)
        
        # 1st edit IndexId related fields in all_areas_nuseds
        cond_focal_NA <- cond_focal & is.na(all_areas_nuseds$MAX_ESTIMATE)
        cond_focal_NAno <-  cond_focal & !is.na(all_areas_nuseds$MAX_ESTIMATE)
        for(f in fields_l$NUSEDS$IndexId){
          # f <- fields_IndexId[1]
          all_areas_nuseds[cond_focal_NAno,f] <- unique(all_areas_nuseds[cond_compare,f])
        }
        
        # show <- all_areas_nuseds[cond_focal | cond_compare,c("IndexId","Year","MAX_ESTIMATE")]
        # show <- show[order(show$Year),]
        # show
        
        # 2nd remove the row with only NA
        all_areas_nuseds <- all_areas_nuseds[!cond_focal_NA,]
        
        # 3rd, remove the eventual duplicated row in cond_compare
        cond <- all_areas_nuseds$IndexId == IndexId_compare & 
          all_areas_nuseds$GFE_ID == GFE_ID
        cond_dupli <- duplicated(all_areas_nuseds$Year[cond])
        if(any(cond_dupli)){
          yr_dupli <- all_areas_nuseds$Year[cond][cond_dupli]
          cond_yr <- all_areas_nuseds$Year == yr_dupli
          cond_NA <- is.na(all_areas_nuseds$MAX_ESTIMATE)
          
          cond_delete <- cond & cond_yr & cond_NA
          if(sum(cond_delete) != 1){
            print("Issue with removing duplicate year with NA - BREAK")
            knitr::knit_exit()
            break
            
          }else{
            all_areas_nuseds <- all_areas_nuseds[!cond_delete,]
          }
        }
        
        # all_areas_nuseds[cond_focal_NA,c("IndexId","GFE_ID","Year","MAX_ESTIMATE")]
        # all_areas_nuseds[cond_focal,c("IndexId","GFE_ID","Year","MAX_ESTIMATE")]
        
        plot_IndexId_GFE_ID_fun(IndexIds = IndexIds,
                                GFE_IDs = rep(GFE_ID,length(IndexIds)),
                                all_areas_nuseds = all_areas_nuseds, 
                                main = "")
        
        mtext(text = paste('Action: MERGED'), side = 3, line = 1,adj = .5, font = 2)
        legend("top",legend = POPULATION_compare,bty = 'n')
        legend("topright",WATERBODY,bty = "n")
        legend("topleft",c(rep("",length(POPULATIONs)),"","AFTER"),bty = "n",text.font = 2)
        
      }else{ # discard it
        
        all_areas_nuseds <- all_areas_nuseds[!cond_focal,]
        
        removed <- data.frame(IndexId = IndexId_focal,
                              GFE_ID = GFE_ID)
        removed$dataset <- "NUSEDS"
        removed$comment <- paste0("The series had only one point in confict or duplicating the series ",
                                  IndexId_compare," & GFE_ID = ",GFE_ID,
                                  " of the same CU: ",cu_name_text)
        removed_all <- rbind(removed_all,removed)
        
        plot_IndexId_GFE_ID_fun(IndexIds = IndexIds,
                                GFE_IDs = rep(GFE_ID,length(IndexIds)),
                                all_areas_nuseds = all_areas_nuseds,main = "")
        
        mtext(text = paste('Action: DELETED'), side = 3, line = 1,adj = .5, font = 2)
        legend("topleft",c(rep("",length(POPULATIONs)),"","AFTER"),bty = "n",text.font = 2)
        legend("topright",WATERBODY,bty = "n")
        legend("top",legend = POPULATION_compare,bty = 'n')
        
      }
      
      #'* Case 2: the shorter series is 100% duplicated --> removed *
    }else if(comparison$nb_dataPt == comparison$duplicate | delete_exception1 | delete_exception2){
      
      # record the data point before deleting them
      d_focal <- all_areas_nuseds[cond_focal,c("IndexId","GFE_ID","Year","MAX_ESTIMATE","ESTIMATE_CLASSIFICATION")]
      d_compare <- all_areas_nuseds[cond_compare,c("IndexId","GFE_ID","Year","MAX_ESTIMATE","ESTIMATE_CLASSIFICATION")]
      
      all_areas_nuseds <- all_areas_nuseds[!cond_focal,]
      
      removed <- data.frame(IndexId = IndexId_focal,
                            GFE_ID = GFE_ID)
      removed$dataset <- "NUSEDS"
      removed$comment <- paste0("The series was duplicating the series ",
                                IndexId_compare," & GFE_ID = ",GFE_ID,
                                " of the same CU: ",cu_name_text)
      removed_all <- rbind(removed_all,removed)
      
      plot_IndexId_GFE_ID_fun(IndexIds = IndexIds,
                              GFE_IDs = rep(GFE_ID,length(IndexIds)),
                              all_areas_nuseds = all_areas_nuseds,
                              main = "")
      
      mtext(text = paste('Action: DELETED'), side = 3, line = 1,adj = .5, font = 2)
      legend("topleft",c(rep("",length(POPULATIONs)),"","AFTER"),bty = "n",text.font = 2)
      legend("topright",WATERBODY,bty = "n")
      legend("top",legend = POPULATIONs,bty = 'n')
      
      
      if(delete_exception1){
        print("Special fix (above): the two blue points are deleted; one is a duplicate, the other one is very close to be one.")
        
      }else if(delete_exception2){
        
        print("Special fix (above): the two red points are deleted; one is a duplicate, the other one has 'UNKNOWN' ESTIMATE_CLASSIFICATION:")
        
        # show the difference in ESTIMATE_CLASSIFICATION when summing data points
        # d_focal <- all_areas_nuseds[cond_focal,c("IndexId","GFE_ID","Year","MAX_ESTIMATE","ESTIMATE_CLASSIFICATION")]
        # d_compare <- all_areas_nuseds[cond_compare,c("IndexId","GFE_ID","Year","MAX_ESTIMATE","ESTIMATE_CLASSIFICATION")]
        
        show <- base::merge(x = d_focal,
                            y = d_compare, 
                            by = c("GFE_ID","Year"), all = T)
        
        # show <- rbind(d_focal,d_compare)
        
        show <- show[order(show$Year),]
        show <- show[!is.na(show$MAX_ESTIMATE.x),]
        
        cond <- grepl("\\.x",colnames(show))
        colnames(show)[cond] <- gsub("\\.x","_s1",colnames(show)[cond])
        cond <- grepl("\\.y",colnames(show))
        colnames(show)[cond] <- gsub("\\.y","_s2",colnames(show)[cond])
        rownames(show) <- NULL
        
        show <- show[!is.na(show$MAX_ESTIMATE_s1),]
        show <- show[!is.na(show$MAX_ESTIMATE_s2),]
        print(show)
        print("***")
      }
      
    }else if(correct_CM_50537_816){
      
      # show the difference in ESTIMATE_CLASSIFICATION when summing data points
      d_focal <- all_areas_nuseds[cond_focal,c("IndexId","GFE_ID","Year","MAX_ESTIMATE","ESTIMATE_CLASSIFICATION","ESTIMATE_METHOD")]
      d_compare <- all_areas_nuseds[cond_compare,c("IndexId","GFE_ID","Year","MAX_ESTIMATE","ESTIMATE_CLASSIFICATION","ESTIMATE_METHOD")]
      
      show <- base::merge(x = d_focal,
                          y = d_compare, 
                          by = c("GFE_ID","Year"), all = T)
      
      show <- show[order(show$Year),]
      show <- show[!is.na(show$MAX_ESTIMATE.x),]
      
      cond <- grepl("\\.x",colnames(show))
      colnames(show)[cond] <- gsub("\\.x","_s1",colnames(show)[cond])
      cond <- grepl("\\.y",colnames(show))
      colnames(show)[cond] <- gsub("\\.y","_s2",colnames(show)[cond])
      rownames(show) <- NULL
      
      show <- show[!is.na(show$MAX_ESTIMATE_s1),]
      show <- show[!is.na(show$MAX_ESTIMATE_s2),]
      
      # 1st find the 9 data points that are duplicated with series_compare
      # return the years with matching abundances
      years_toRemove <- c()
      for(i in 1:length(series_focal)){
        # i <- 1
        yr_here <- names(series_focal)[i]
        val_compare <- series_compare[as.character(yr_here)]
        if(!is.na(val_compare) & !is.na(series_focal[i])){
          if(series_focal[i] == val_compare){
            years_toRemove <- c(years_toRemove,yr_here)
          }
        }
      }
      years_toRemove <- as.numeric(years_toRemove)
      years_toRemove <- years_toRemove[years_toRemove < 1960] # there is one duplicated points for later years but it looks legit
      
      years_toKeep <- unique(sort(c(d_focal$Year,d_compare$Year)))
      years_toKeep <- years_toKeep[! years_toKeep %in% years_toRemove]
      
      # Calculate the sum and retain the method and classification associated to
      # the highest abundance
      sum_l <- sum_2timeSeries_nuseds_fun(IndexId_1 = IndexIds[1], 
                                          IndexId_2 = IndexIds[2],
                                          GFE_ID_1 = GFE_ID, 
                                          GFE_ID_2 = GFE_ID, 
                                          all_areas_nuseds = all_areas_nuseds,
                                          conservation_unit_system_sites = conservation_unit_census_sites,
                                          method_sum = "highest abundance", 
                                          years = years_toKeep)
      
      # Remove the focal series
      cond_remove <- all_areas_nuseds$IndexId == IndexId_focal & all_areas_nuseds$GFE_ID == GFE_ID
      all_areas_nuseds <- all_areas_nuseds[!cond_remove,]
      
      removed <- data.frame(IndexId = IndexId_focal,
                            GFE_ID = GFE_ID)
      removed$dataset <- "NUSEDS"
      removed$comment <- paste0("We removed the duplicated data points and merged by summing the rest of them to series ",
                                IndexId_compare," & GFE_ID = ",GFE_ID,
                                " of the same CU: ",cu_name_text)
      removed_all <- rbind(removed_all,removed)
      
      # Modify the compared series for the years with overlap
      cond_modif <- all_areas_nuseds$IndexId == IndexId_compare & all_areas_nuseds$GFE_ID == GFE_ID
      for(r in 1:nrow(sum_l$sum)){
        # r <- 1
        cond_yr <- all_areas_nuseds$Year == sum_l$sum$Year[r]
        all_areas_nuseds$MAX_ESTIMATE[cond_modif & cond_yr] <- sum_l$sum$MAX_ESTIMATE[r]
        all_areas_nuseds$ESTIMATE_METHOD[cond_modif & cond_yr] <- sum_l$sum$ESTIMATE_METHOD[r]
        all_areas_nuseds$ESTIMATE_CLASSIFICATION[cond_modif & cond_yr] <- sum_l$sum$ESTIMATE_CLASSIFICATION[r]
      }
      
      plot_IndexId_GFE_ID_fun(IndexIds = IndexIds,
                              GFE_IDs = rep(GFE_ID,length(IndexIds)),
                              all_areas_nuseds = all_areas_nuseds,main = "")
      
      mtext(text = paste('Action: DELETED & SUMMED & MERGED'), side = 3, line = 1,adj = .5, font = 2)
      legend("topleft",c(rep("",length(POPULATIONs)),"","AFTER"),bty = "n",text.font = 2)
      legend("topright",WATERBODY,bty = "n")
      legend("top",legend = POPULATION_compare,bty = 'n')
      
      print("Special fix (above): the blue points before 1950 are deleted, the other ones are summed to the red series.")
      
      # pring show
      print("Below is MAX_ESTIMATE and ESTIMATE_CLASSIFICATION for the data points summed:")
      print(show)
      print("***")
      
      #'* Case 3: on the rest of the series *
      #'    - points that are conflictual or duplicated are added
      #'    - points that are complementary are merged
    }else{
      
      if(correct_STAMP_RIVER_BELOW_FALLS){
        # we set  CN_3306 - 11487 as the focal series because (1) CN_3306 is associated
        # to several other GFE_IDs and (2) its POPULATION does not match with WATERBODY
        # show the difference in ESTIMATE_CLASSIFICATION when summing
        # there are multiple time series with CN_3306
        cond_CN_3306 <- all_areas_nuseds$IndexId == "CN_3306"
        GFE_ID_CN_3306 <- all_areas_nuseds$GFE_ID[cond_CN_3306] |> unique()
        WATERBODY_CN_3306 <- all_areas_nuseds$WATERBODY[cond_CN_3306] |> unique()
        POPULATION_CN_3306 <- all_areas_nuseds$POPULATION[cond_CN_3306] |> unique()
        
        # plot
        plot_IndexId_GFE_ID_fun(IndexIds = rep("CN_3306",length(GFE_ID_CN_3306)), 
                                GFE_IDs = GFE_ID_CN_3306, 
                                all_areas_nuseds = all_areas_nuseds)
        mtext(text = cu_name_text, side = 3, line = 1,adj = 0)
        mtext("POPULATION", side = 3, line = 1, adj = .5)
        legend("top",POPULATION_CN_3306,bty = "n")
        mtext("WATERBODY", side = 3, line = 1, adj = 1)
        legend("topright",WATERBODY_CN_3306,bty = "n")
        
        
        print("The POPULATION of series CN_3306 - 11487 does not align well with WATERBODY (1st plot above).")
        print("Additonally, IndexId/POP_ID CN_3306 is associated to multiple GFE_ID (plot above).")
        print("**DECISIONS:**")
        print("Merge CN_3306 - 11487 to CN_3320 - 11487 in NUSEDS.")
        print("***")
        
        cond_focal <- all_areas_nuseds$IndexId == "CN_3306" & all_areas_nuseds$GFE_ID == 11487
        cond_compare <- all_areas_nuseds$IndexId == "CN_3320" & all_areas_nuseds$GFE_ID == 11487
        
        IndexId_focal <- "CN_3306"
        IndexId_compare <- "CN_3320"
        
        layout(matrix(1))
      }
      
      if(cond_CM_47925_15){
        # need to reverse the focal and compare series because of the more recent data point
        cond_focal <- all_areas_nuseds$IndexId == "CM_47928" & all_areas_nuseds$GFE_ID == 15
        cond_compare <- all_areas_nuseds$IndexId == "CM_47925" & all_areas_nuseds$GFE_ID == 15
        IndexId_focal <- "CM_47928"
        IndexId_compare <- "CM_47925"
      }
      
      if(cond_CO_41342_1358){
        # need to reverse the focal and compare series because of unknow run timing
        # and FULL_CU_IN determined by DFO so no potient miss attribution of the CU
        # on our end
        cond_focal <- all_areas_nuseds$IndexId == "CO_41342" & all_areas_nuseds$GFE_ID == 1358
        cond_compare <- all_areas_nuseds$IndexId == "CO_41343" & all_areas_nuseds$GFE_ID == 1358
        IndexId_focal <- "CO_41342"
        IndexId_compare <- "CO_41343"
      }
      
      if(cond_CN_40023_1208){
        # need to reverse the focal and compare series to avoid changing most recent 
        # data and the POPULATION match better CU_NAME as it contains "fall"
        # note that FULL_CU_IN already exist for both in all_area_nuseds_all
        cond_focal <- all_areas_nuseds$IndexId == "CN_40023" & all_areas_nuseds$GFE_ID == 1208
        cond_compare <- all_areas_nuseds$IndexId == "CN_40024" & all_areas_nuseds$GFE_ID == 1208
        IndexId_focal <- "CN_40023"
        IndexId_compare <- "CN_40024"
      }
      
      # show the difference in ESTIMATE_CLASSIFICATION when summing
      d_focal <- all_areas_nuseds[cond_focal,c("IndexId","GFE_ID","Year","MAX_ESTIMATE","ESTIMATE_CLASSIFICATION")]
      d_compare <- all_areas_nuseds[cond_compare,c("IndexId","GFE_ID","Year","MAX_ESTIMATE","ESTIMATE_CLASSIFICATION")]
      
      show <- base::merge(x = d_focal,y = d_compare, by = c("GFE_ID","Year"), all = T)
      show <- show[order(show$Year),]
      show <- show[!is.na(show$MAX_ESTIMATE.x),]
      
      cond <- grepl("\\.x",colnames(show))
      colnames(show)[cond] <- gsub("\\.x","_s1",colnames(show)[cond])
      cond <- grepl("\\.y",colnames(show))
      colnames(show)[cond] <- gsub("\\.y","_s2",colnames(show)[cond])
      rownames(show) <- NULL
      
      show <- show[!is.na(show$MAX_ESTIMATE_s1),]
      show <- show[!is.na(show$MAX_ESTIMATE_s2),]
      
      # 1st change the IndexId of focal series to the compared one
      for(f in fields_l$NUSEDS$IndexId){
        # f <- fields_IndexId[1]
        all_areas_nuseds[cond_focal,f] <- unique(all_areas_nuseds[cond_compare,f])
      }
      
      # 2nd sum MAX_ESTIMATE values for duplicated years
      SUMMED <- F
      yr_duplicated <- all_areas_nuseds[cond_focal | cond_compare,]$Year[duplicated(all_areas_nuseds[cond_focal | cond_compare,]$Year)]
      for(yr in yr_duplicated){
        # yr <- yr_duplicated[1]
        cond_yr_both <- (cond_focal | cond_compare) & all_areas_nuseds$Year == yr
        cond_yr_focal <- cond_focal & all_areas_nuseds$Year == yr
        cond_yr_compare <- cond_compare & all_areas_nuseds$Year == yr
        
        MAX_ESTIMATE_focal <- all_areas_nuseds$MAX_ESTIMATE[cond_yr_focal]
        MAX_ESTIMATE_compare <- all_areas_nuseds$MAX_ESTIMATE[cond_yr_compare]
        
        ESTIMATE_METHOD_focal <- all_areas_nuseds$ESTIMATE_METHOD[cond_yr_focal]
        ESTIMATE_METHOD_compare <- all_areas_nuseds$ESTIMATE_METHOD[cond_yr_compare]
        
        ESTIMATE_CLASSIFICATION_focal <- all_areas_nuseds$ESTIMATE_CLASSIFICATION[cond_yr_focal]
        ESTIMATE_CLASSIFICATION_compare <- all_areas_nuseds$ESTIMATE_CLASSIFICATION[cond_yr_compare]
        
        if(all(is.na(c(MAX_ESTIMATE_focal,MAX_ESTIMATE_compare))) | (is.na(MAX_ESTIMATE_focal) & !is.na(MAX_ESTIMATE_compare))){ # keep the value of the compared series
          all_areas_nuseds$MAX_ESTIMATE[cond_yr_both] <- MAX_ESTIMATE_compare
          all_areas_nuseds$ESTIMATE_METHOD[cond_yr_both] <- ESTIMATE_METHOD_compare
          all_areas_nuseds$ESTIMATE_CLASSIFICATION[cond_yr_both] <- ESTIMATE_CLASSIFICATION_compare
          
        }else if(!is.na(MAX_ESTIMATE_focal) & is.na(MAX_ESTIMATE_compare)){
          all_areas_nuseds$MAX_ESTIMATE[cond_yr_both] <- MAX_ESTIMATE_focal
          all_areas_nuseds$ESTIMATE_METHOD[cond_yr_both] <- ESTIMATE_METHOD_focal
          all_areas_nuseds$ESTIMATE_CLASSIFICATION[cond_yr_both] <- ESTIMATE_CLASSIFICATION_focal
          
        }else if(!is.na(MAX_ESTIMATE_focal) & !is.na(MAX_ESTIMATE_compare)){
          all_areas_nuseds$MAX_ESTIMATE[cond_yr_both] <- MAX_ESTIMATE_focal + MAX_ESTIMATE_compare
          
          select <- which(c(MAX_ESTIMATE_focal,MAX_ESTIMATE_compare) == max(c(MAX_ESTIMATE_focal,MAX_ESTIMATE_compare)))
          
          all_areas_nuseds$ESTIMATE_METHOD[cond_yr_both] <- c(ESTIMATE_METHOD_focal,ESTIMATE_METHOD_compare)[select]
          all_areas_nuseds$ESTIMATE_CLASSIFICATION[cond_yr_both] <- c(ESTIMATE_CLASSIFICATION_focal,ESTIMATE_CLASSIFICATION_compare)[select]
          
          SUMMED <- T
        }
        
        
        # vals <- all_areas_nuseds$MAX_ESTIMATE[cond_yr_both]
        # ESTIMATE_CLASSIFICATIONs <- all_areas_nuseds$ESTIMATE_CLASSIFICATION[cond_yr_both]
        # 
        # if(any(!is.na(vals))){
        #   val <- sum(vals,na.rm = T)
        #   all_areas_nuseds$MAX_ESTIMATE[cond_yr_both] <- val
        #   
        #   # if indeed counts were added up (i.e. not just one value)
        #   if(sum(!is.na(vals)) > 1){ # more than one value is not NA
        #     
        #     SUMMED <- T
        #     
        #     # define ESTIMATE_CLASSIFICATION: select the value corresponding to the higher MAX_ESTIMATE
        #     val <- ESTIMATE_CLASSIFICATIONs[vals == max(vals, na.rm = T)]
        #     all_areas_nuseds$ESTIMATE_CLASSIFICATION[cond_yr_both] <- val
        #   }
        # }
      }
      
      # 3rd remove the rows with duplicated years in the focal
      cond_toDelete <- cond_focal & all_areas_nuseds$Year %in% yr_duplicated
      all_areas_nuseds <- all_areas_nuseds[!cond_toDelete,]
      
      plot_IndexId_GFE_ID_fun(IndexIds = IndexIds,
                              GFE_IDs = rep(GFE_ID,length(IndexIds)),
                              all_areas_nuseds = all_areas_nuseds, main = "")
      
      
      # mtext(text = paste("CU_NAME:",cu_name_text), side = 3, line = 1,adj = 0)
      legend("topleft",c(rep("",length(POPULATIONs)),"","AFTER"),bty = "n",text.font = 2)
      legend("top",legend = POPULATIONs,bty = 'n')
      legend("topright",legend = WATERBODY,bty = 'n')
      
      if(SUMMED){
        mtext(text = paste('Action: SUMMED & MERGED'), side = 3, line = 1,adj = .5, font = 2)
      }else{
        mtext(text = paste('Action: MERGED'), side = 3, line = 1,adj = .5, font = 2)
      }
      
      #
      if(SUMMED){
        print("Below is MAX_ESTIMATE and ESTIMATE_CLASSIFICATION for the data points summed:")
        print(show)
        print("***")
      }
```
